---
title: "final_squash.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/final_squash.js"
loc: 65
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.27
style_score: 2.78
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 6.44
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `walkDir`
- `dirPath`
- `isDirectory`
- `processVis`
- `content`
- `fixFile`
- `content`
